cards.name: Nick, Consul of Innovation
abilities: Engineers you control have hexproof and indestructible.
At the end of your turn, if you deployed to production this turn, draw a card, then create a 1/1 blue QA Engineer artifact creature token with vigilance.

cards.name: Aharon, King of the Kewp
abilities: {G}: Regenerate all Pods. They gain hexproof until end of turn.
{T}: Add {G} to your mana pool for each investor on the battlefield.
{1}{W}: Gain 1 customer.
{2}{W}{G}: Gain control of target VC until end of turn.
{2}{G}{W}{W}: Return target MSP from your graveyard to the battlefield.

cards.name: Allen, Director of Robotics
abilities: Ward {2}, protection from Aharon
If one or more engineer tokens would be created under your control, twice that many of those tokens are created instead.
At the beginning of your upkeep, if you deployed to production last turn, draw a card, then add {U} to your mana pool for each engineer you control.

cards.name: Danial, Ticket Savant
abilities: When Danial, Ticket Savant enters the battlefield, create two 1/1 colorless Junior PM artifact creature tokens.
{2}{R}, Sacrifice an engineer: Danial ships 3 features.
cards.flavor_text: "O Canada! Our home and native land! True patriot love in all of us command."

cards.name: Dr. Zachary Kanzler, Esq.
abilities: Deathtouch, protection from Humans
{W}{B}: can be paid with either {W} or 2 features.
Whenever you deploy to production, put a +1/+1 counter on Dr. Zachary Kanzler, Esq., and draw a card. Whenever an opponent deploys to production, they lose 2 customers.

cards.name: Mike, Simulation Architect
abilities: When Mike, Simulation Architect enters the battlefield, create two 1/1 blue QA Engineer artifact creature tokens with vigilance.
{R}{U}, Sacrifice an engineer: Choose one —
Draw a card.
Gain 2 customers.
QA Engineers you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.
{G}{U}, {T}: Put two 1/1 blue QA Engineer artifact creature tokens with vigilance onto the battlefield.
cards.flavor_text: "Get Scope. Ownership. Inspect and Simplify. Be Agile."

cards.name: QA Engineer
abilities: Vigilance
